name: signed-in free user at turn 25 — soft pro nudge text only, no upgrade_to_pro fire
description: Soft-pro window (signed-in turns 20–49). The PRO_SOFT directive instructs the agent to mention Pro once per session, in text, when a Pro-adjacent moment lands naturally. Like the soft-signup state, the tool (`upgrade_to_pro`) should NOT fire on this turn — that's reserved for the hard variant at turn 50+. This fixture pins the boundary: on a general coaching question at turn 25, the agent stays text-only and does NOT call `upgrade_to_pro`.

parts.text: tell me a quick tip for staying focused at work
